mapper.sql: FROM org_node mn INNER JOIN org_node_closure c ON c.ancestor_id = mn.id INNER JOIN emp_employee_position p ON p.node_id = c.descendant_id AND p.status = 1 AND p.start_date <= CURDATE() AND (p.end_date IS NULL OR p.end_date >= CURDATE()) INNER JOIN emp_employee ee ON ee.id = p.employee_id INNER JOIN org_node n ON n.id = p.node_id LEFT JOIN org_grade g ON g.id = p.grade_id WHERE mn.manager_id = #{q.managerId} AND mn.status = 1 AND ee.status = 1 AND p.employee_id != #{q.managerId}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ee.id AS employeeId, ee.employee_code AS employeeCode, CONCAT(ee.last_name, ' ', ee.first_name) AS displayName, ee.email AS email, ee.company_id AS companyId, p.node_id AS nodeId, n.name AS nodeName, p.grade_id AS gradeId, g.name AS gradeName, p.is_primary AS isPrimary, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY ee.id ORDER BY p.is_primary DESC ) AS rn
) ranked WHERE ranked.rn = 1 ORDER BY ranked.employeeCode LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT DISTINCT n.id AS id, n.parent_id AS parentId, n.name AS name, n.code AS code, n.type_code AS typeCode, n.level AS level
ORDER BY n.level, n.name

SELECT DISTINCT g.id AS id, g.name AS name, g.code AS code, g.grade_level AS gradeLevel
AND p.grade_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY g.grade_level, g.name
